---
title: "Notes"
author: "Nathan Lunceford"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
    
---

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 1  
- [Bisection Method](./w01/bisection-method.html)
- [Fixed-Point Iteration](./w01/fixed-point-iteration.html)
- [Newtons's Method](./w01/newtons-method.html)
- [Secant Method](./w01/secant-method.html)

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 2
- [Lagrange Interpolation](./w02/lagrange-interpolation.html)
- [Newton’s Divided Differences](./w02/newtons-divided-differences.html)

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 3
- [Interpolation Error Formula](./w03/interpolation-error-formula.html)
- [Runge Phenomenon](./w03/runge-phenomenon.html)
- [Chebyshev Interpolation](./w03/chebyshev-interpolation.html)

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 4
- [Trapezoidal Rule](./w04/trapezoidal-rule.html)

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 5

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 6

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 7

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 8

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 9

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 10

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 11

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 12

:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false collapse="true"}
## Week 

:::
